scripts.build:web: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && wasm-bindgen --out-dir dist/pkg --out-name bevyosc --target web target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/bevyosc.wasm
scripts.build:vst: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-vst cargo run -p xtask -- bundle bevyosc-vst --release
scripts.dev: bun run build:web && bun run serve
